positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for space_vampire_pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    suck(space)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    is_vacuum(space)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~is_vacuum(X0) | suck(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    space != duster).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~suck(duster)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define is_plunger(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define is_vampire(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define is_duster(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define is_household_appliance(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for space_vampire_neg.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,negated_conjecture,
    is_vampire(space)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~is_vacuum(X0) | suck(X0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    is_vacuum(space)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~is_vampire(X0) | suck(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    space != duster).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~suck(duster)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    suck(space)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define is_plunger(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define is_duster(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define is_household_appliance(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
